title: Fairy Light Battery Operated 2Pack LED Lights with Timer Setting Warm White String Lights, 2M 2Pack Silver Wire Starry Lighting, for Bedroom, Indoor, Christmas Tree, Wedding Decor Idea Put in Jars
features: ★【Bright Little Fairy Lights】: These Best 2Pack 20 LEDs Micro LED Battery Operated String Lights Lamp are perfect for using as a lighting addition to any decorative project. delicate copper wire hosts 50 very small LED bulbs that are about size of the rise grain and are intensely bright. With steady 360 degree viewing angle they illuminate in every direction.

★【Easy to Shape and Mold & Timer】:Delicate and Flexible fairy lights can be wrapped into any shape as you like and the small battery box is easy to hide, required 3*AAA Batteries (Not Included) . Push the switch to the middle, you can active the timer function for 6 hours on and 18th hours off.

★【Low Energy Consumption/Battery Operated】The wire lights are powered by 3 AAA batteries with 4.5V low voltage safety design. Newest Clear and Small Battery Box is Easy to Hide Requires 3 AA Batteries (Batteries Not Included). The battery lights string is made of silver-plated copper material, which insulates heat, will stay cool to touch even after hours of working.

★【Perfect Decorative Lights】:These fairy LED lights are very suitable for bedroom, wedding, party, indoor, outdoor, Mason jar, table centerpiece, handicraft projects, and DIY Christmas Tree, and also widely applicate in Christmas, Halloween, Valentine's Day, Carnival lights, festive lighting, and decoration lights

★【Warranty& Energy Efficient】: We offer 1-Year quality guarantee. Please contact the seller directly if you have any quality problems. NO heat problem, no flicker The ultra slim thin copper wire decrease energy cost.
